TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun kramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun kramaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-qramaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hbun kramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun kramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun kramay hya' ga Hbun-Qramay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun kramaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun kramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun-qramaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
